Used for: bringing data in / saving results

read_csv() → load CSV file into DataFrame
read_excel() → load Excel sheet
read_json() → load JSON data
read_sql() → load data from database
read_html() → extract tables from web pages
read_parquet() → fast big-data file loading
to_csv() → save DataFrame to CSV
to_excel() → save to Excel
to_json() → save as JSON
to_sql() → save to database


Used for: understanding dataset

head() → first rows preview
tail() → last rows preview
sample() → random rows
info() → column types + nulls
describe() → stats summary
shape → rows & columns count
columns → column names
dtypes → data types
index → row index info
memory_usage() → memory consumption


Used for: detecting and fixing nulls

isna() / isnull() → find missing values
notna() → find non-missing values
dropna() → remove missing rows/columns
fillna() → replace missing values
replace() → replace any value
interpolate() → fill using trend
ffill() → forward fill
bfill() → backward fill


Used for: picking data

loc[] → label-based selection
iloc[] → position-based selection
at[] → single value by label
iat[] → single value by index
filter() → select columns/rows
query() → SQL-like filtering
isin() → check membership
between() → range filtering
where() → keep values conditionally
mask() → replace values conditionally


Used for: ordering data

sort_values() → sort by column
sort_index() → sort by index
rank() → ranking values
nlargest() → top values
nsmallest() → lowest values


Used for: changing structure

drop() → remove rows/columns
rename() → rename columns
assign() → add new columns
insert() → insert column at position
pop() → remove + return column
set_index() → change index
reset_index() → reset index
astype() → change datatype
copy() → duplicate dataset
update() → overwrite values


Used for: summarizing data

groupby() → group data
agg() → multiple aggregations
mean() → average
sum() → total
count() → count values
min() / max() → extremes
median() → middle value
std() → spread
var() → variance
apply() → custom logic per group
transform() → transform group values


Used for: joining datasets (SQL style)

merge() → SQL join
concat() → stack datasets
join() → join by index
merge_asof() → time-based join
merge_ordered() → ordered merge
combine_first() → fill missing from another df
pivot() → reshape data
pivot_table() → aggregated pivot
crosstab() → frequency table


Used for: text cleaning

str.lower() → lowercase
str.upper() → uppercase
str.contains() → search text
str.replace() → replace text
str.split() → split strings
str.strip() → remove spaces
str.len() → string length
str.extract() → regex extraction
str.findall() → find patterns
str.cat() → join strings


Used for: time-series data

to_datetime() → convert to date
date_range() → generate dates
Timedelta() → time difference
dt.year → extract year
dt.month → extract month
dt.day → extract day
dt.hour → extract hour
dt.weekday → day of week
dt.strftime() → format date
resample() → time aggregation


Used for: custom logic

apply() → apply function
map() → map values
applymap() → element-wise (DataFrame)
pipe() → chain operations
eval() → fast expression evaluation


Used for: feature engineering

clip() → limit values
round() → rounding
abs() → absolute values
diff() → difference between rows
shift() → shift data
pct_change() → percentage change
cumsum() → cumulative sum
cumprod() → cumulative product
rolling() → moving window
expanding() → cumulative window


Used for: changing structure

melt() → wide to long
stack() → columns → rows
unstack() → rows → columns
wide_to_long() → reshape format
explode() → expand lists
get_dummies() → one-hot encoding
